svg.title: Sub-C: Pump Mounting Bosses — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: 4x Mounting Bosses + 2x Motor Cradles — Third-Angle Orthographic Projection
Material: PETG | All dimensions in mm | Printed integral with tray floor (Sub-A)
DETAIL C: Cradle Section (XZ at Y=116.5)

g.text: 1. All features printed integral with tray floor (Sub-A). No separate attachment.
2. Heat-set inserts: M3 x 5.7mm brass, pressed with soldering iron into 4.00mm pilot holes.
3. Fasteners: M3 x 8mm SHCS, stainless steel, 2.5mm hex key. 4 total (2 per pump).
4. Motor cradle arcs require support material during printing (overhang > 45 deg).
5. Motor body diameter is LOW confidence (~35mm). Verify before final print.
6. Bracket ear thickness estimated ~1.5mm. Verify for screw engagement calculation.
